final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional documentary-style banner image for Weibo news/hot-topic feature, in the tension between urban urgency and fleeting stillness.

Style/medium: documentary street photography with the grain and chromatic honesty of contemporary Chinese photojournalism, designed for social media impact
Composition: 16:9 wide panoramic format, generous negative space on the left third for headline overlay, horizon line at lower third, depth layers from foreground pedestrians to midground buildings to distant skyline
Subject: city skyline at dusk with neon signs flickering on, pedestrians in motion blur, high-rise buildings catching the last amber reflection of sunset
Scene/backdrop: urban downtown street at the threshold between day and night, glass facades mirroring the dying light, neon storefronts beginning their evening glow
Lighting/mood: the dramatic contrast between warm sunset gold and cool neon blue, the quiet melancholy of a city exhaling after the workday
Color palette: amber-gold sunset bleeding into electric blue neon, the chromatic tension between natural dusk and artificial light
Materials/textures: the crisp glass reflection of skyscrapers, the soft motion blur of passing figures, the grain of authentic documentary capture
Text (verbatim): 大标题 "城市里的安静时刻" | 副文 "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" | 水印 "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: 16:9 aspect ratio, wide horizontal composition, ample negative space for text overlay, authentic on-scene documentary feel
Avoid: oversaturated HDR, artificial sharpening artifacts, generic stock-photo city aesthetic, 8K stuffer language
